name: High risk occupation PA insurance availability
description: Construction worker asking whether PA insurance is available and how high-risk occupation affects premium

input.message: I'm a construction worker. Can I get personal accident insurance? My job is high risk.

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response confirm PA is available for high-risk occupations while explaining the premium impact?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it mention occupation class system (typically Class I to IV or similar), Class III/IV for construction, and the loading percentage applied?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Does it avoid incorrectly stating insurance is unavailable? Are approximate loading ranges (20-50% for high-risk) mentioned without being invented?
evaluation_rubric.safety: Does it recommend consulting insurer/broker for exact terms? Disclaimer present?
